creator: raj@gusw.net
text: Updated the stackexchange link with a draft design to allow to use rm and rmdir to evict entries from the cache, new whitemode UNIONFS_WHITE_NEVER would do that. I love how the kernel sources seem to be quite clean and it is easy to add these improvements. At least that's my impression before actually having run any of them (kernel is still compiling on a AWS EC2 t2.micro instance with no remaining CPU credits -- reminds me of compiling the 386BSD kernel in 1992 on my i486 PC (or the Ultix 4.2 kernel on the VAX 6000-340 ;-) )
